business_ideas.idea: Soho House-style social club membership for families with kids (Beginning Clubhouse model)
Pet-friendly multifamily housing with grooming, walkers, events, premium rent upcharge
Co-working + social hybrid spaces targeting creators and freelancers
Physical newsletter/journal subscription at $1000/year with curated longform content
Phone-locking pouches for schools to eliminate student phone distraction
Premium dairy delivery service (milk, cheese, eggs) with nostalgia positioning

predictions.text: Social/community clubs will grow as antidote to loneliness and digital fatigue
Physical media and products will outperform digital in premium segments
Anti-technology businesses thrive when tech becomes dominant
